headline: A Look At Gen Digital (GEN) Valuation As AI Security Launches Follow Strong Q3 FY2026 Results And Growth Guidance
summary: Gen Digital (GEN) has put AI security at the center of its story, pairing the launch of VPN for Agents and expanded Norton AI Agent Protection with Q3 FY2026 results and guidance for continued high single digit growth. See our latest analysis for Gen Digital. Despite a steady stream of AI security launches and partnerships with xAI and Microsoft, Gen Digital’s 1 year total shareholder return is down 23.92%, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 20.29% signals longer term gains from an...
